title: Add paired-sample mean tests
description: Add a paired-samples test section to the hypothesis testing chapter, covering large-sample and small-sample tests for the mean difference with examples, exercises, activity, summary updates, and chapter-end practice.
close_reason: Added paired-sample tests section with large-sample z and small-sample t cases, examples, activities, summary bullets, and chapter exercises; web build passed.

title: Add small-sample two-sample mean tests
description: Restructure the two-sample mean-test section into large-sample and small-sample subsections, then add a small-sample t-test explanation with examples/exercises/summary updates as appropriate.
close_reason: Restructured two-sample mean tests into large-sample and small-sample subsections, added Welch two-sample t-test explanation, example, exercise, activity structure, summary, and chapter exercise; web build passed.

title: Normalize normal-distribution notation
description: Find and fix all book source instances where a normal distribution is labeled with variance as the second parameter instead of standard deviation. Use N(mu, sigma) throughout.
close_reason: Changed the normal population notation from N(mu,sigma^2) to N(mu,sigma) and verified no remaining normal labels use variance as the second parameter.

title: Add two-sample mean test section
description: Add a section to the hypothesis testing chapter explaining large-sample two-sample z-tests for the difference of means, with examples/exercises/summary updates as appropriate.
close_reason: Added two-sample mean-test section with example, activity, summary updates, and chapter exercises; web build passed.

title: Add appendix on normal approximation for cell counts
description: Add a first appendix explaining why large contingency-table cell counts are approximately normal under suitable conditions, then revise the chi-square independence section to link to that appendix.
close_reason: Added first appendix on normal approximation for contingency-table cell counts and linked chi-square independence section to it; web and print builds pass.

title: Add chi-square independence test section
description: Add a section on the chi-square test of independence to the statistics book, connect it to contingency tables in conditional probability, and update related examples, activities, exercises, introduction, and summary.
close_reason: Added chi-square independence test section with examples, activity, exercises, and chapter intro/summary updates; web build passes.

title: Fix print build LaTeX warnings
description: pretext build print succeeds, but final LaTeX pass still reports an undefined reference to tbl-pets-owned and overfull hboxes in the probability contingency table and two-sample mean-test section. Investigate and clean these print-layout warnings.
close_reason: Cleaned print build warnings by moving the pets table into the activity task, shortening the contingency table labels, shortening the two-sample section title, and simplifying the two-sample summary table; final print pass has no LaTeX warnings or overfull boxes.

value: For statbook, write normal distributions as N(mu, sigma), using mean and standard deviation as parameters, not N(mu, sigma^2). When discussing variance, state it separately.
